ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the financial document:  Ahlada Engineers Limited's 21st AGM focuses on routine approvals, including FY2025-26 financial statements and the appointment of new statutory auditors, M/s. M M Reddy & Co. A significant material impact and potential red flag is the proposed re-appointment of Whole Time Director Ms. Ahlada Chedepudi for a Rs. 40 lakh annual remuneration, which is explicitly guaranteed even if the company has inadequate or no profits, raising concerns about corporate governance and shareholder value.
